## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss CRO tactics and content strategy for ProjectMark's website and blog.](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pre-construction topics (e.g., lead generation, bid management) generate high interest in email campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [RB2B tool for identifying website visitors shows promise for lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Sidebar widgets and in-content CTAs to be implemented for gated content and lead capture](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Infographics and visual enhancements planned to enrich blog content](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)

## Topics

### Current Content Performance

  - [Pre-construction topics generating high interest in email campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [High click-through rates on topics like lead generation, bid management, and pipeline management](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Existing in-content CTA for demo requests performing well](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### CRO Tactics Discussion

  - [Sidebar widgets: Implement email capture forms for downloadable content (e.g., case studies, reports)](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [In-content CTAs: Create visually striking, contrasting blocks to drive downloads or sign-ups](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=636.0)
  - [Lead magnets: Develop calculators, checklists, and reports as gated content](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)
  - [Existing ROI calculator to be optimized by gating results behind email capture](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)

### Website Visitor Identification Tools

  - [RB2B tool introduced for real-time visitor identification and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Features include LinkedIn profile matching and ideal customer profile management](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=913.0)
  - [Free trial available for testing before full implementation](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
  - [Alternative tool: Get Koala, offering similar functionality with AI-powered insights](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

### Content Enhancement Strategies

  - [Create more checklists, RFPs, and downloadable documents aligned with blog content](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Develop infographics to summarize articles and enhance visual appeal](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=1388.0)
  - [Establish brand guidelines for consistent design in new visual assets](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)

### Additional Marketing Tactics

  - [Backlinking and digital PR strategies to be explored for improved SEO](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Press releases distribution through platforms like Cision to reach broader audiences](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Continued use of email newsletters for leads and clients](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=1109.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Gus to explore RB2B free trial for website visitor identification](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=950.0)
  - [Andrej to contact Jimmy about setting up RB2B and provide further information](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=1656.0)
  - [Team to collaborate on creating downloadable checklists and documents for blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Juliano to set up guidelines for adding more visual assets to blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
  - [Andrej to research Cision for press release distribution possibilities](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=1507.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for tomorrow to discuss new content strategy and topics](https://fathom.video/share/RsXRsxYvQsKZxyEWPHxmsvUVCMd9PAKa?tab=summary&timestamp=1704.0)
